name: Strawberry Waldorf Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
2. Allow the mixture to cool.
3. Add the sliced strawberries, diced apples, sliced celery, and chopped walnuts.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
5. Chill until almost set (jelly-like consistency).
6. Stir in the sour cream.
7. Pour into a 5-cup ring mold.
8. Refrigerate until firm.
9. The center may be filled with chicken salad.
